Package com.irurueta.commons.units

This package contains classes related to units conversion, measurements of distances, volumes, weight, etc.

See: Description

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    Distance
    Contains a distance value and unit.
    DistanceConverter
    Class to do distance conversions to different units.
    DistanceFormatter
    Class in charge of formatting or parsing a distance value and unit.
    LocationDistanceEstimator
    Helper class to estimate dinstance between two points expressed in latitude and longitude coordinates in degrees.
    MeasureFormatter<T extends Measurement,U extends Enum>
    Base class to format a parse a given measure using its value and unit.
    Measurement<T extends Enum>
    Base class to define a measurement unit and value.
    UnitLocale
    Helper class to determine the appropriate unit system for a given locale.
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    DistanceUnit
    Enumerator containing recognized units.
    PaperSize
    Paper size.
    UnitSystem
    Enumerator containing supported unit systems.
  • Exception Summary 
    Exception Description
    UnitsException
    Base exception class for this package.
    UnknownUnitException
    Exception raised when a measure unit cannot be determined.

This package contains classes related to units conversion, measurements of distances, volumes, weight, etc.
